mapper.select: select r.review_id, r.movie_id, r.review_title, r.review_content, r.cre_dt, r.update_dt, r.rating, r.view_count, m.member_id from review r JOIN member m ON r.user_id = m.user_id ORDER BY r.review_id DESC;
select r.*, member_id from review r JOIN member m ON r.user_id = m.user_id where r.review_id = #{reviewId}
mapper.insert: insert into review(movie_id, user_id, review_title, review_content, rating) values (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{reviewTitle}, #{reviewContent}, #{rating})
